name: BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious download using the BITS client from a FQDN that is unusual. Adversaries may abuse BITS jobs to persistently execute or clean up after malicious payloads.

False positives:
- This rule doesn't exclude other known TLDs such as ".org" or ".net". It's recommended to apply additional filters for software and scripts that leverage the BITS service

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=16403 AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.azureedge.net/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.com/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.sfx.ms/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%download.mozilla.org/%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=16403 AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.azureedge.net/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.com/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.sfx.ms/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%download.mozilla.org/%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD
